sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5477" key="a)mpe/leios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπέλ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5477.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of vine</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vineyard,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
